meaning: n.[生](细胞有丝分裂的)末期
examples: There were micronucleus at telophase in another pollen mother cells.
The nucleus in shrinking cytoplasm of microspore mother cell enters into telophase. 17.
Partial synchronization of cell division at anaphase-telophase has also been obtained only using HU treatment, mitotic frequency has reached at 17%.
